DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ORIANA ZILL'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED, WITH MONETARY SANCTIONS AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFFS IBRAHIM BASMA, ABESS BASMA, AND HUSSEIN BASMA IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 1,386.30 (ASSUMING NO HEARING AND THEREFORE REDUCING REQUESTED AMOUNT BY $240 FOR TWO HOURS). THE MOTION IS GRANTED ON THE GROUNDS SET FORTH IN THE MOVING PAPERS, AND: (1) THE MOTION IS NOT OPPOSED. (2) PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT SUBMITTED ANY RESPONSE OR PROPOSED RESPONSE TO THE DISCOVERY PROPOUNDED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, NOT REPORTED. =302/HK

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Attendance At Deposition; Memo Of P & A; Req. For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorney Fees; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HUNTER W. SIMS OF STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER, TEL. NO. (510) 457-3468 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ORIANA ZILL'S MOTION To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition is Granted, with monetary sanctions awarded against plaintiffs Ibrahim Basma, Abess Basma, and Hussein Basma in the amount of $ 1,386.30 (assuming no hearing and therefore reducing requested amount by $240 for two hours). The Motion is granted on the grounds set forth in the moving papers, and: (1) the Motion is not opposed. (2) Plaintiffs have not submitted any response or proposed response to the discovery propounded. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Not reported. =302/HK
